mapper.sql: select trend_id, project_id, test_type, execute_date, case_total_count, case_succ_count, case_fail_count, success_rate, execute_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from test_trend
mapper.insert: insert into test_trend (project_id, test_type, execute_date, case_total_count, case_succ_count, case_fail_count, success_rate, execute_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{projectId}, #{testType}, #{executeDate}, #{caseTotalCount}, #{caseSuccCount}, #{caseFailCount}, #{successRate}, #{executeTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update test_trend
project_id = #{projectId},
test_type = #{testType},
execute_date = #{executeDate},
case_total_count = #{caseTotalCount},
case_succ_count = #{caseSuccCount},
case_fail_count = #{caseFailCount},
success_rate = #{successRate},
execute_time = #{executeTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where trend_id = #{trendId}
mapper.delete:
delete from test_trend where trend_id in
#{trendId}
